member.name: T:EMS.API.Controllers.AuthController
member.summary: Handles user registration and login. All endpoints are decorated with [AllowAnonymous] — no JWT token required. Passwords are hashed with BCrypt (workFactor: 12) before storage. On successful login a signed JWT token is returned containing the username, role, and expiry claims.

member.name: M:EMS.API.Controllers.AuthController.#ctor(EMS.API.Interfaces.IAuthService)
member.summary: Injects the auth service via constructor injection.

member.name: M:EMS.API.Controllers.AuthController.Register(EMS.API.DTOs.RegisterRequestDto)
member.summary: POST /api/auth/register Registers a new user account. Accepts: { username, password, role? } Role defaults to "Viewer" if omitted. Valid values: "Admin" or "Viewer". Passwords are hashed with BCrypt (12 rounds) — never stored in plain text. Returns 201 Created on success. Returns 409 Conflict with a descriptive message if the username is already taken. Returns 400 Bad Request if validation fails (e.g. password shorter than 6 chars).

member.name: M:EMS.API.Controllers.AuthController.Login(EMS.API.DTOs.LoginRequestDto)
member.summary: POST /api/auth/login Authenticates a user and returns a signed JWT token. Accepts: { username, password } BCrypt.Verify() is used to compare the submitted password against the stored hash. Returns 200 OK with { success, token, username, role, message } on success. Returns 401 Unauthorized with { success: false, message } on failure. The error message deliberately does not reveal which field is wrong (security best practice).

member.name: T:EMS.API.Controllers.EmployeesController
member.summary: Manages all Employee CRUD operations, the dashboard endpoint, and server-side search/filter/sort/pagination. All endpoints require a valid JWT Bearer token. Write operations (POST, PUT, DELETE) are restricted to the Admin role.

member.name: M:EMS.API.Controllers.EmployeesController.#ctor(EMS.API.Interfaces.IEmployeeService)
member.summary: Injects the employee service via constructor injection.

member.name: M:EMS.API.Controllers.EmployeesController.GetDashboard
member.summary: GET /api/employees/dashboard Returns all KPI metrics (total, active, inactive, departments), department breakdown with percentages, and the last 5 employees added. Computed via SQL COUNT() and GROUP BY — no client-side aggregation. Accessible by both Admin and Viewer roles.

member.name: M:EMS.API.Controllers.EmployeesController.GetAll(EMS.API.DTOs.EmployeeListQueryDto)
member.summary: GET /api/employees?search=&department=&status=&sortField=id&sortDir=asc&page=1&pageSize=15 Returns a paginated, filtered, and sorted list of employees. All filtering and sorting executes in SQL — no JavaScript processing. Search uses SQL LIKE on (FirstName + ' ' + LastName) and Email. Accessible by both Admin and Viewer roles.

member.name: M:EMS.API.Controllers.EmployeesController.GetById(System.Int32)
member.summary: GET /api/employees/{id} Returns a single employee record by primary key. Returns 404 Not Found if the employee does not exist. Accessible by both Admin and Viewer roles.

member.name: M:EMS.API.Controllers.EmployeesController.Create(EMS.API.DTOs.EmployeeRequestDto)
member.summary: POST /api/employees Creates a new employee record. Admin role required. Validates all fields via Data Annotations on EmployeeRequestDto. Returns 201 Created with the new employee object on success. Returns 409 Conflict if the email address already belongs to another employee. Returns 403 Forbidden if called with a Viewer JWT.

member.name: M:EMS.API.Controllers.EmployeesController.Update(System.Int32,EMS.API.DTOs.EmployeeRequestDto)
member.summary: PUT /api/employees/{id} Updates an existing employee record. Admin role required. Allows the same email to be resubmitted (the current employee is excluded from the uniqueness check so edit-without-email-change works correctly). Returns 200 OK with the updated employee object on success. Returns 404 if the employee does not exist. Returns 409 Conflict if the email belongs to a different employee. Returns 403 Forbidden if called with a Viewer JWT.

member.name: M:EMS.API.Controllers.EmployeesController.Delete(System.Int32)
member.summary: DELETE /api/employees/{id} Permanently removes an employee record by primary key. Admin role required. Returns 200 OK with a confirmation message on success. Returns 404 Not Found if the employee does not exist. Returns 403 Forbidden if called with a Viewer JWT.
